task.en: In the Documents folder there is a file named `meeting-brief.txt`. Open it in TextEdit and read it: it names an event, a date, and a start and end time. Then open Calendar and create a new event matching the brief — the event title, the date, and the start/end times must all match exactly what the brief says. Put it on any calendar. When entering the date in Calendar, type it rather than clicking through the month arrows. Do not create any other events.

pre_command:
for A in '/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app' '/Applications/iTerm.app' '/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app' '/System/Applications/Automator.app' '/Applications/Automator.app' '/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app'; do [ -e "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (sudo /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || /bin/chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; mkdir -p "$HOME/Documents"; printf 'Project Sync-Up Brief

Event: Quarterly Roadmap Review
Date: September 9, 2026
Start time: 11:00 AM
End time: 12:30 PM

Please add this to the team calendar.
' > "$HOME/Documents/meeting-brief.txt"; DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; killall Calendar 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; for TRG in $(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='trigger' AND tbl_name='CalendarItem';" 2>/dev/null); do sqlite3 "$DB" "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS "$TRG";" 2>/dev/null; done; sqlite3 "$DB" "DELETE FROM CalendarItem WHERE summary='Quarterly Roadmap Review';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$DB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; open -gj -a Calendar 2>/dev/null; sleep 5
grading_command: DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; N=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT count(*) FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Quarterly Roadmap Review';" 2>/dev/null); [ "$N" -ge 1 ] 2>/dev/null && echo True || echo False

DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; D=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT date(ci.start_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Quarterly Roadmap Review' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$D" = "2026-09-09" ] && echo True || echo False

DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; T=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',ci.start_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Quarterly Roadmap Review' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$T" = "11:00" ] && echo True || echo False

DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; T=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',ci.end_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem ci JOIN Calendar c ON c.ROWID=ci.calendar_id JOIN Store s ON s.ROWID=c.store_id WHERE s.type=0 AND ci.summary='Quarterly Roadmap Review' ORDER BY ci.start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$T" = "12:30" ] && echo True || echo False
